title: Mounts & Monsters
description: minecraft mod that adds features with the theme of mounts of mayhem update
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/593cd91efcf008f0da301b9e2182a67fd8d2f717.png)
Do you think the 1.21.11 Mounts of Mayhem update didn't add enough new features, Well this mod is for you
In this mod we plan to expand on Minecraft 1.21.11 with features players wanted as well as features that just fit the update
The first update adds 5 new mounts from 3 new skeleton horse variants to a ridable polar bear, we also add the abillity to trim horse & nautilus armors



Wanna Know everything added:

Video Coming Soon



If you have suggestions for possible future features let us know! The best place is in Belgie's Discord under the suggestions forum! - Join Belgies Discord



Huge Thanks to Centauri, TheBlockyGoat, Popopi, Fofurbo, Moog & Admiral for helping with the mod!

Do you need a server to run Mounts of Mayhem on so you can experience the update with your friends!

Check out winternode, one of the best Minecraft server hosts: [Click this link for 25% off your first Month!!](https://clients.winternode.com/aff.php?aff=86)
